strategy: She takes +35% from Ice and Life and resists Death 80%. Hit with Ice or Life. She is stunnable, so a stun can buy a setup round.
Round 1 she casts a +35% Death-damage global. Since you are not attacking with Death, it barely helps her; leave it up rather than fighting it.

If you do NOT try to replace the global she periodically Scarecrows the team (620 drain, about every 4 rounds), and from Round 30 she Scarecrows regardless. Heal through the occasional Scarecrow and race her down before Round 30.
If you replace her global she simply recasts it; Strangle dispels that recast if you want it gone.
Blade up, stun if handy, and land an Ice or Life nuke.
cheatNotes: Her Round 1 +35% Death global only helps Death damage, which you are not using. Leave it and save cards.
Replace her global and she just recasts it. Do not waste turns fighting it.
Strangle dispels her recast global if you insist on removing it.
Leaving the global alone lets her Scarecrow the team every ~4 rounds, and always from Round 30 on. Heal through it and kill her before Round 30.
